commands.title: RDP Password Spraying
commands.description: Attempts to login to multiple hosts in the subnet using a single set of credentials. Replace `<target>` with subnet or IP range.

commands.title: Screenshot After Login
commands.description: Takes a screenshot after successful RDP login. Use `--screentime` to set delay before capture (e.g. 5 seconds).

commands.title: Screenshot of Login Page (NLA Disabled)
commands.description: Captures a screenshot of the RDP login screen. Only works when Network Level Authentication (NLA) is disabled.

commands.title: Check RDP Encryption Level
commands.description: Uses NSE script to enumerate supported encryption levels of RDP service.

commands.title: Detect RDP (Service and Version)
commands.description: Detects RDP service and its version running on the host.

commands.title: Connect to RDP (Windows - MSTSC)
commands.description: Launch Remote Desktop Connection to connect to a remote host via IP.

commands.title: Connect to RDP (Linux - xfreerdp)
commands.description: Connects to an RDP host from Linux using FreeRDP. Requires xfreerdp to be installed.

commands.title: RDP: Try without credentials (TLS)
commands.description: Attempt RDP connection without credentials using TLS.

commands.title: RDP: Force RDP security (RDP)
commands.description: Force use of the older RDP security protocol instead of TLS.

commands.title: RDP: Using username (NLA, blank password)
commands.description: Connect as KioskUser0 using NLA with an intentionally blank password field.

commands.title: Connect to RDP (macOS - Microsoft Remote Desktop)
commands.template: Open Microsoft Remote Desktop → Add PC → Enter IP and credentials
commands.description: Use the Microsoft Remote Desktop app from the Mac App Store to connect to RDP hosts.

commands.title: Hydra RDP Brute Force
commands.description: Performs brute-force RDP login with Hydra. Replace placeholders as needed.
